{"verdict":"request_changes","summary":"The `Deck` interface exposes more than the named downstream target needs and leaves its main action lemma out of simp normal form.","findings":[{"file":"TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck.lean","line":"39","issue":"The PR publicly exposes a general `MulAction (Y ≃ₜ Y) Y` plus faithful and continuity instances for all homeomorphism groups, although the stated target only needs the action of `Deck p` on `E`.","fix":"Define the `Deck p` action/faithfulness/continuity instances directly, or keep any ambient homeomorphism-action helper private/internal until TauCeti actually needs that public API." ,"evidence":"Lines 39-51 add public `Homeomorph.applyMulAction`, `Homeomorph.smul_def`, `Homeomorph.applyFaithfulSMul`, and `Homeomorph.continuousConstSMul`; the only advertised downstream API is `Deck p` and `Deck.proj_smul`."},{"file":"TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/UniversalCover/Deck.lean","line":"74","issue":"`Deck.proj_smul` is the characteristic normal-form lemma for the public action, but it is not marked `[simp]`, so users cannot simplify `p (h • e)` without naming the lemma or unfolding the subgroup action.","fix":"Add `@[simp]` to `Deck.proj_smul` unless there is a concrete loop risk, and keep `Deck.comp_eq` as the composition-level simp lemma.","evidence":"Line 74 proves `p (h • e) = p e`; this is the intended eliminator for deck transformations acting on points and is listed as the main result."}]}

verdict_obj.summary: The `Deck` interface exposes more than the named downstream target needs and leaves its main action lemma out of simp normal form.

findings.issue: The PR publicly exposes a general `MulAction (Y ≃ₜ Y) Y` plus faithful and continuity instances for all homeomorphism groups, although the stated target only needs the action of `Deck p` on `E`.
findings.fix: Define the `Deck p` action/faithfulness/continuity instances directly, or keep any ambient homeomorphism-action helper private/internal until TauCeti actually needs that public API.
findings.evidence: Lines 39-51 add public `Homeomorph.applyMulAction`, `Homeomorph.smul_def`, `Homeomorph.applyFaithfulSMul`, and `Homeomorph.continuousConstSMul`; the only advertised downstream API is `Deck p` and `Deck.proj_smul`.

findings.issue: `Deck.proj_smul` is the characteristic normal-form lemma for the public action, but it is not marked `[simp]`, so users cannot simplify `p (h • e)` without naming the lemma or unfolding the subgroup action.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to `Deck.proj_smul` unless there is a concrete loop risk, and keep `Deck.comp_eq` as the composition-level simp lemma.
findings.evidence: Line 74 proves `p (h • e) = p e`; this is the intended eliminator for deck transformations acting on points and is listed as the main result.
